GG0170M2_1_STP_GOAL_CD GG0170M2 Mobility: Goal to Go Up 1 step (curb) by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to go up and down a curb and/or up and down one step by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
